description: Prioritized defect list by user-facing severity

severity_categories.P0_layout_break: Structural differences that change visible layout or content composition
severity_categories.P1_wrong_data_widget: Correct layout but wrong data fields, columns, or widget content
severity_categories.P2_wrong_behavior: Correct appearance but incorrect interaction or state behavior
severity_categories.P3_minor_token_drift: Small visual differences in spacing, colors, icons, or text that don't affect usability

prioritized_defects.area: Dashboard reception list shows IDs not names
prioritized_defects.description: Dashboard TIEP NHAN KHACH HANG shows appointment IDs (AP215851) instead of customer names (Luu Thi Thu). Original shows customer names. Live parity text_overlap=0.0, replica_id_ratio=1.0.
prioritized_defects.impact: User sees meaningless IDs instead of patient names on dashboard

prioritized_defects.description: Replica has 4 stat cards above main content. Original goes directly to TIEP NHAN KHACH HANG.
prioritized_defects.impact: Extra UI element not in original changes page layout structure

prioritized_defects.description: Tabs include counts (Tat ca 200). Original has no counts in tabs.
prioritized_defects.impact: Different tab naming convention and display style

prioritized_defects.description: Default sort is alphabetical. Original sorts by most recent appointment.
Defaults to Tat ca chi nhanh. Original defaults to specific branch.
